_comment: EDGE CASE: dual_pov_split — this is one of two scene cards covering the same dramatic event. The scene is the same; the focalizer changes. Compare with the companion file dual_pov_split_b.json. Both are valid GBR. The two cards together demonstrate 'internal_multiple' focalization across a single dramatic event.

character_states.want: alex wants to be heard without having to beg

canonical_summary.want: alex wants to be heard without having to beg

scene_turns.patient: the full evidence of Morgan's oversight
scene_turns.result: Morgan dismisses it without looking up

scene_turns.patient: that Morgan will never acknowledge the harm
scene_turns.result: Alex stops arguing and makes the decision to leave

canonical_summary.delta: Alex does not get what they wanted (to be heard) but achieves something more important: the clarity to act.
